productDisplayName: ADIDAS Unisex White Pack of 3 Socks
description: Style NoteWear these socks with trainers when you're working out. adidas ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Product DetailsThree pairs of white socks, crew length, with ribbed opening and Adidas patented three stripes in black at opening and brand logo on ribbed designingMaterial and Care80% cotton, nylon 16% and lycra 4%Machine wash in cold water or hand wash separatelyDo not tumble dry, use softeners or bleachLine dry
